name: copilotprompts-m365-wrapup-day-tomo-planner
title: M365 Daily Wrap-Up and Tomorrow Planner
shortDescription: Summarize today's progress and generate a concise action plan for tomorrow using Outlook, calendar, and task data.
longDescription: Daily wrap-up and tomorrow planning prompt for Microsoft 365 Copilot. Reviews today's meetings, emails, and tasks; captures outcomes, blockers, and top priorities; and builds a practical plan for the next day with focus blocks and follow-up actions.
Use this prompt as a daily productivity ritual for finishing strong and starting tomorrow with clear direction.

thumbnails.alt: Prompt for daily wrap-up and tomorrow planning using Microsoft 365 Copilot
